name: PHOCA
description: PHOCA ($PHOCA) — the seal coin, 2600 years in the making. A community & charity token on Solana for seal lovers worldwide: part of every transfer fee is withheld on-chain to support seal rescue centers, marine mammal research and ocean protection. Named after the seal genus Phoca and the ancient Greek city of Phocaea, whose first coins (~600 BC) bore a seal. Devnet learning build — not deployed to mainnet. Not financial advice.
